name: Israeli Orange Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 large Onion, cut in large slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse and dry the chicken. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
2. Insert one whole orange into the chicken.
3. Place the chicken breast side down in a roasting pan, surrounded by onion slices.
4. Mix the orange juice with ginger; pour over the chicken.
5. Roast uncovered at 350°F for 30 minutes.
6. Remove the chicken from the oven and turn it over. Spread honey over the chicken.
7. Surround the chicken with another sliced orange and return to the oven.
8. After five minutes, baste with wine and pan juices. If browning too quickly, cover with foil.
9. Baste again after 30 minutes and continue cooking until drumsticks are easily removable, about one more hour.
10. Remove the oranges from the chicken and slice them. Garnish as desired.
Note: Haroset makes a good stuffing for this dish.
